textByHash.82f5889458849daf7926e1c0c4eab9a603b72fee: I buy silk. If you ever want to sell any silk, bring it here.
textByHash.b9cff7ef22f5bb045450bfbc7498cff9e85e52bd: Ah I may be interested in that. What sort of price were you looking at per piece of silk?
textByHash.1b5d60f9d984651d8f44316babf77af78745f7fd: 80 coins? That's a bit steep! How about 40 coins?
textByHash.0955e7d246b08a3e481874a389a6adfafe957853: You'll never get that much for it. I'll be generous and give you 50 for it.
textByHash.309013cdcc6a9024d6865edd83f3e72eefd7c2d9: You drive a hard bargain, but I guess that will have to do.
textByHash.b5236610af8760ed8039eae2335b72264b31730c: Don't be ridiculous! That is far too much. You insult me with that price.
textByHash.191312e2125c128c3bc1e74c493c8a50be0bb494: Hey! Get your hands off there!
textByHash.bb8a164a3321aa6f8a12fe948ec2e940b594a61a: You're the one who stole something from me!
